items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: It's all my fault. A rookie mistake... I forgot to install the overload safety unit... I made it self-destruct...

options.text: It was unforgettable in every way.

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: R-Really? You don't have to just say that to make me feel better...

options.text: Its unique build was really one-of-a-kind.
The first thing it did on startup was protect us.

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: Yes, you find it cute as well, don't you? That was my masterful design, especially the part with the TARD-E head!

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: After all, each part was originally an Academy creation. The mission to "protect" is written in the deepest layer of their operational logic.

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: If only it could hear your compliments...

options.text: You're not giving up, are you?
Is this the end of your dream?

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: Of course not! I'll treat this experience as the starting point of my research.

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: One day, I'll create an even more perfect Mechascout!

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: But before that, I want to erect a statue here. To honor its memory, to remember my mistakes, and to remember your aid.

items.speaker: Zeon
items.text: Just wait and see. I promised you an Unparalleled Mechascout, and an Unparalleled Mechascout I shall deliver!

items.speaker: Haughty Student
items.text: The way you ride, I doubt you'd even break the speed limit inside the Academy. You really think you can race us?

items.speaker: Short-tempered Student
items.text: Don't give me that crap! Everyone knows there are speed-limiters on campus vehicles!

items.speaker: Short-tempered Student
items.text: You're the one who's desperate for these parts for your experiment, and you proposed this race! Getting cold feet now? Just hand over the parts and walk away, and I'll forget this ever happened!

items.speaker: Haughty Student
items.text: Ha. Very funny! Me? Bail? We had a deal, whoever smashes the most boxes gets the parts! A word once spoken...

options.text: Not even a Sabercat would catch up!
Not even the Exostrider could catch up!

items.speaker: Short-tempered Student
items.text: That's right!... Wait, who the heck are you?

options.text: I heard the winner gets the Spacetrek Explorer parts?
If this is a race, I want in.

items.speaker: Short-tempered Student
items.text: Hmph, I don't care if you're some backup they called in.

items.speaker: Short-tempered Student
items.text: You want a race? You're on!
